inputs.titre: Le mariage de Philippe IV le Bel avec Jeanne de Navarre, héritière du royaume de Navarre et du comté de Champagne.

reason: The image depicts a wedding scene within a grand hall that appears to be from the medieval period, aligning with the marriage of Philippe IV le Bel and Jeanne de Navarre. The clothing, architecture, and general atmosphere are consistent with the 13th century. However, the dresses all have a suspiciously modern cut and clean finish (more like a modern movie set than what would've been available during the 1200s). The dresses would not have been so form fitting. The glass of the lanterns and stained glass windows would not have been so clear. The general lack of dirt and grime is also unrealistic. Furthermore, it would be extremely unlikely to have such a large crowd of 'courtiers' with no obvious guards present.
